metadata.homeDescription: Classic cuts, beard work and shaves in central Nijmegen. 4.8★ on Google · Book your appointment online.

hero.sub: Cuts, beards and shaves — for years.
hero.imageAlt: Barber at work in his salon — over-the-shoulder shot

items.name: Cut + shave
items.desc: The full sit, in one visit.

about.paragraph: At Samir you don't get a rushed cut — you get attention to detail, conversation if you want it, quiet if you'd rather. Classic cuts, beard work and the hot-towel shave our guests write about.
about.img1Alt: Interior — vintage barber chair and mirrors
about.img2Alt: Detail — clippers and combs on marble

items.text: These guys are best and know how to take care of their clients. Thanks for the amazing shave.
items.author: Saad B.

items.text: Barbershop in the middle of Nijmegen. Friendly and professional staff. Also lots of parking nearby.
items.author: J V A

reviews.readAll: Read all 105 reviews on Google Maps ↗

footer.tagline: Classic craft, in the heart of Nijmegen. Since — Groenestraat.

cookie.text: We only use functional cookies. No tracking, no ads.

diensten.metaDescription: All services and prices for our barbershop in Nijmegen. Haircut, beard, shave and combinations — honest prices, bookable online.
diensten.intro: All prices include VAT. Card, cash and contactless accepted. Walk-ins welcome — but book ahead to be sure of a seat.

items.name: Haircut
items.desc: Classic cut, clipper or scissor. Wash and styling included.

items.name: Kids' cut · ≤12 yrs
items.desc: Patient, with distraction for the little ones.

items.name: Senior · 65+
items.desc: Classic cut, taken at a relaxed pace.

items.name: Beard shave · hot towel
items.desc: Classic straight-razor shave. Hot towel, lather, aftercare.

items.name: Classic shave
items.desc: The full ritual: hot towel, prep, two passes, cold towel, balm.

items.name: Cut + beard
items.desc: Haircut paired with a beard trim.

items.name: Cut + shave
items.desc: Haircut plus classic shave in one visit.

items.name: The full service
items.desc: Haircut, beard trim and classic shave. Plan for around 75 minutes.

notes.title: Not fast, not careful — meticulous.
notes.body: The shave isn't a transaction — it's a sit. Hot towel to open the beard, two razor passes, cold towel to close. Plan for 45 minutes.

notes.title: Walk in, or book ahead.
notes.body: Walk-ins welcome — coffee's always on. Thursdays and Saturdays fill up; book online or call ahead on those days.

notes.title: Card, cash, contactless.
notes.body: All the usual ways. No credit cards. No tip jar — but it's appreciated.

team.metaDescription: Meet the barbers of Samir Kapsalon. Craft and personal contact in the heart of Nijmegen.
team.intro: Two barbers, one chair-room. Ask for your preferred barber when booking — or let us match you.

members.bio: 20+ years behind the chair. The hot-towel shave is his signature — guests travel from Arnhem and Wijchen to sit in it.
members.portraitAlt: Samir Yılmaz — owner and senior barber

members.bio: Modern cuts, beard work, fades. Quick hands — never rushed. Ask him about textured crops.

team.careersTitle: Experienced barber? Drop by for a chat.
team.careersBody: No forms. Drop in, cut a few heads with us, and we'll talk. Or send us a DM on Instagram.

galerij.metaDescription: Snapshots from our barbershop in Nijmegen. Interior, work in progress, classic craft in pictures.
galerij.intro: Snapshots from our spot on Groenestraat. Interior, work in progress, finished cuts.
galerij.caption: Images are placeholders pending a half-day photo shoot in the Groenestraat shop.

contact.metaDescription: Find Samir Kapsalon at Groenestraat 277 in Nijmegen. Call 024 355 7011 or book online. Easy parking nearby.
contact.callNote: During opening hours — outside: DM on Instagram.
contact.parkingBody: Paid street parking along Groenestraat and adjacent streets. Easy to find a spot, as guests note in their reviews.
contact.hoursBody: Thursdays we stay late. Sundays closed — the coffee's for the neighbourhood, not us.

booking.metaDescription: Book your appointment online at Samir Kapsalon in Nijmegen. Choose service, barber and time.
booking.intro: Four steps. No account needed. Confirmation by email.
booking.sideHelp: Prefer to call or walk in? Walk-ins always welcome.
booking.barberAnyDesc: We'll pick the first open chair.
booking.notesPlaceholder: E.g. prefer a quiet time, or a specific request.
booking.confirmNote: You'll get a confirmation by SMS and, if provided, email. Pay with card, cash or contactless at the shop.
booking.submitError: Something went wrong. Try again or call us.
booking.successBody: Your booking is in. Keep this confirmation handy — or drop it in your calendar.
